runtimeSnapshot.requestedBoundary: per StencilCoverAaPolygonDraw fragment return before fixed-function blend
runtimeSnapshot.observedBoundary: fragment shader storage side-channel written immediately before returning @location(0)
runtimeSnapshot.diagnosticShader: diagnostic in-memory FOR-412 shader-return variant of shaders/aa_stencil_cover.wgsl
runtimeSnapshot.pipelineLayout: diagnostic-only render layout: binding0 AA uniform, binding1 fragment storage buffer

scope.scene: M60 F16 bounded stroke cap/join target-colorspace blend

comparisonPolicy.shaderReturnMeaning: sourceColorSentToBlend is the non-synthetic vec4f returned by the fragment shader @location(0), already premultiplied and coverage-applied
comparisonPolicy.correctedColorBeforeCoverageMeaning: derived from captured colorAfterColorFilter or captured colorAfterTargetColorspaceIfNeeded according to the captured candidateBranchReached branch
comparisonPolicy.for408ReplayFieldMeaning: sourceFieldUsedByFOR408Replay is the pre-existing FOR-408 sourceColorPremulRgbaFloat before FOR-411 coverage multiplication
comparisonPolicy.replayMath: premultiplied float SrcOver with shader return: out = shaderReturn + dst * (1 - shaderReturn.a)

classificationReason: FOR-412 captures the actual fragment shader return value sent to fixed-function blend for the bounded M60 F16 AA stencil-cover subdraws. The classification compares that value with the FOR-408/FOR-411 source field, a source-over replay using FOR-410 dstBefore, and the FOR-405 post-pass readback.
